regulation_time_definition: 90 minutes + stoppage time. Extra time and penalty shootouts are excluded.
publish_mode_policy: market_reconciled (default when 6-vendor BDL odds available), market_implied (fallback), pure_model (no odds or diagnostic).

prediction.tail_policy: Poisson mass beyond max_goals=15; grid is publish-normalized
